title: K-200 Propulsion Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-478-H. Revision: H. Type: manual. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-02-21. Last modified: 2023-12-17. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1001, P-1085, P-1158, P-1052.
